channel.title: website on Ayham's Online Website
channel.description: Recent content in website on Ayham's Online Website

item.title: Pushing Static Pages to The Limit
item.description: Static webpages are well renowned for their speed, security, and simplicity. A very common misconception is that static webpages can’t enjoy Javascript. Here is how I got this website to template applications that use Javascript and WASM using Hugo’s shortcode system. addapp (JS + CSS) shortcode Create a new shortcode file in theme/<name>/layouts/shortcodes/addapp.html: 1 2 3 4 5 6 <!-- ENTERING SHORTCODE: addapp --> {{- $appName := .Get 0 }} {{- $appJS := resources.

item.title: blogit: A Complete Guide
item.description: Running a personal website should be an easy task. Unfortunately, a big hindrance is that there aren’t many “suckless” blogging system. blogit🔗 is the closest in terms of simplicity and minimalism to perfection. This article would be an end-all be-all guide to effectively install blogit onto your own website.
